action.reasoning: Observation: iter 14 eval failed because predict.py built_classifier_from_state tried to access weight.shape[0] on a tensor that wasn't 2D, causing IndexError. The best_head.pt contains only the head state dict (Sequential keys like '0.weight'), which predict.py couldn't handle. Analysis: predict.py must robustly load both full model checkpoints and head-only checkpoints. Decision: Rewrite predict.py to detect checkpoint type and load accordingly: if full model (vision encoder keys present), load full model; else, load pretrained CLIP and build head from state dict using known architecture (Linear->LayerNorm->ReLU->Dropout->Linear). Then submit eval with best_head.pt immediately to get a potentially higher score within remaining 0.67h.
